tasks.name: Add the cheapest double-DIN Apple CarPlay stereo under $400 with 4+ stars to the cart
tasks.description: Find car stereos with Apple CarPlay, double-DIN size, at least 4-star rating, priced at $400 or less, sort by price, and add the cheapest matching stereo to the cart.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click the "Car Audio" option in the main navigation menu.
From the dropdown or category list, click on "Car Stereos & Receivers."
In the filters sidebar, open the "Features" section and check the box for "Apple CarPlay."
In the "Size" or "DIN" filter, select the "Double-DIN" option.
In the "Customer Rating" filter, select "4 stars & up."
In the price filter, enter "400" in the maximum price field and apply the filter.
Open the sort dropdown above the product list and select "Price: Low to High."
Click on the first product image or title in the sorted results list (the cheapest stereo that matches the filters).
On the product detail page, leave the quantity set to "1" and click the "Add to Cart" button.

tasks.name: Compare 6.5" component speaker sets and wishlist the one with higher RMS power
tasks.description: Find 6.5-inch component speaker sets between $100 and $200 with 4.5+ star ratings, compare the first two, and add the one with the higher RMS power to the wishlist.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click "Car Audio" in the main navigation and select "Speakers."
In the "Type" filter, select "Component Speakers."
In the "Size" filter, select "6.5" speakers (6.5" or 6-1/2").
Set the price filter to show items between $100 and $200 by entering "100" as minimum and "200" as maximum.
In the "Customer Rating" filter, select "4.5 stars & up."
In the product results, check the comparison checkbox for the first and second products in the list.
Click the "Compare" button or link to open the product comparison page for those two speaker sets.
On the comparison page, identify which of the two speakers has the higher RMS power specification and click that product’s name or image to open its detail page.
On that speaker’s product page, click the "Add to Wishlist" or "Save for Later" button.

tasks.name: Build a 3-piece car audio system under $600 using the cheapest 4+ star items
tasks.description: Select one car stereo, one speaker set, and one subwoofer, each with at least 4 stars, always choosing the cheapest item in each category, and add them to the cart so the combined subtotal is under $600.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click "Car Audio" in the main navigation and select "Car Stereos & Receivers."
In the "Customer Rating" filter, select "4 stars & up," then open the sort dropdown and choose "Price: Low to High."
Click on the first product in the results list, read the price shown in the product details section as the stereo price, and click the "Add to Cart" button.
Use the breadcrumb navigation to go back to the "Car Audio" category and click on "Speakers."
Again select "4 stars & up" in the rating filter, choose "Price: Low to High" in the sort dropdown, and click on the first speaker product shown.
On the speaker product page, note the price shown as the speaker price and click "Add to Cart."
Use the breadcrumb to return to "Car Audio" and select the "Subwoofers" category, then set the rating filter to "4 stars & up" and sort by "Price: Low to High."
Click on the first subwoofer listed, read the price as the subwoofer price, and click the "Add to Cart" button.

tasks.name: Find a 4-channel amplifier with 600W+ RMS under $350 and add the most-reviewed one to the cart
tasks.description: Search for car amplifiers, filter to 4-channel models with at least 600W RMS under $350 and 4+ star rating, sort by number of reviews, and add the most-reviewed amplifier to the cart.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click on the search bar in the header, type "car amplifier 4 channel" and press Enter to run the search.
In the power or RMS filter, set the minimum RMS power to "600W" and apply the filter.
In the price filter, enter "350" as the maximum price and apply the filter.
In the "Channels" filter, select the "4-channel" option and in the rating filter choose "4 stars & up."
Open the sort dropdown above the results and select "Most Reviewed" or "Customer Reviews: High to Low."
Click the first amplifier product in the sorted list (the one with the highest number of reviews).
On the amplifier product page, ensure the quantity is set to "1" and click the "Add to Cart" button.

tasks.name: Add a subwoofer + amplifier bundle with wiring kit, free shipping, and price $250–$450 (quantity 2) to the cart
tasks.description: Filter for subwoofer and amplifier bundles priced between $250 and $450 that offer free shipping, choose the first one that clearly includes a wiring kit, and add two units to the cart.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click "Car Audio" in the main navigation and select "Packages & Bundles" or "Subwoofer & Amp Packages" if available.
If a subcategory filter is present, select the option for "Subwoofer + Amplifier Packages."
Set the price filter to show products between $250 and $450 by entering "250" as the minimum and "450" as the maximum.
In the shipping filter options, select the checkbox for "Free Shipping" or equivalent.
Scroll through the filtered results and click on the first bundle whose title or features section mentions a "wiring kit" or "amp kit included."
On the bundle product page, change the quantity selector to "2."
Click the "Add to Cart" button to add two of this bundle to the cart.

tasks.name: Find a Bluetooth stereo with backup camera input that fits a 2018 Honda Civic Sedan under $500 and add the second-cheapest to the cart
tasks.description: Use the vehicle fit tool for a 2018 Honda Civic Sedan, filter stereos that fit this vehicle with Bluetooth and backup camera input under $500 and 4+ stars, sort by price, and add the second-cheapest matching stereo to the cart.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click the "Shop by Vehicle" or "Select Your Vehicle" option in the header.
Use the dropdowns to select Year "2018," Make "Honda," Model "Civic," and Body Style "Sedan," then click the button to find products for this vehicle.
On the vehicle results page, click on the category link for "Car Stereos & Receivers that fit your vehicle."
In the feature filters, check the boxes for "Bluetooth" and "Backup Camera Input."
Set the maximum price to "$500" in the price filter and choose "4 stars & up" in the customer rating filter.
Open the sort dropdown for the product list and select "Price: Low to High."
In the sorted results, click on the second product in the list (the second-cheapest stereo that matches).
On the stereo’s product page, click the "Add to Cart" button.

tasks.name: Choose a premium stereo over $700 with 4.5+ stars, add a 3-year warranty, and proceed with standard shipping at checkout
tasks.description: Find a high-end car stereo over $700 with at least 4.5 stars, select a 3-year protection plan, add it to the cart, and at checkout choose standard shipping and enter basic contact details.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click "Car Audio" in the main navigation and select "Car Stereos & Receivers."
Set the minimum price filter to "$700" and in the rating filter choose "4.5 stars & up."
Sort the results by "Price: High to Low" and click on the first product in the list.
On the product page, locate the protection or warranty options and select the "3-Year Protection Plan" or closest 3-year warranty option.
Click the "Add to Cart" button, then click "View Cart" or the cart icon in the header.
On the cart page, click the "Proceed to Checkout" button.
On the checkout page, in the shipping options section, select the "Standard Shipping" option.
In the contact information form, type "user@example.com" into the email field and "Test User" into the full name field.

tasks.name: Add three different installation accessories (wiring kit, dash kit, antenna adapter) under $40 with 4+ stars to the cart
tasks.description: Navigate to installation accessories, filter to items under $40 with at least 4 stars, and add one amp wiring kit, one dash kit, and one antenna adapter (all different products) to the cart.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click "Car Audio" in the main navigation and select "Installation Accessories."
Set the price filter maximum to "$40" and choose the "4 stars & up" option in the customer rating filter.
In the subcategory or filter list, click on "Amp Wiring Kits" and then click the first product in the results.
On the wiring kit product page, click the "Add to Cart" button.
Use the breadcrumb navigation to return to the "Installation Accessories" page, then select the "Dash Kits" subcategory and click the first product shown.
On the dash kit product page, click "Add to Cart," then use the breadcrumb to go back to "Installation Accessories" and select the "Antenna Adapters" subcategory.
Click on the first antenna adapter in the results list and on its product page click the "Add to Cart" button.

entities.name: Category
entities.description: Product categories and subcategories such as Car Audio, Car Stereos & Receivers, Speakers, etc.

fields.name: name
fields.description: Display name, e.g., 'Car Stereos & Receivers'

fields.name: code
fields.description: Machine code used in URLs as categoryId parameter

fields.name: parentCategoryId
fields.description: Optional parent category (e.g., 'car_audio' as parent of 'speakers')

fields.name: displayOrder
fields.description: Sort order in navigation or category lists

entities.name: Product
entities.description: Individual products including stereos, speakers, subwoofers, amplifiers, bundles, and installation accessories.

fields.name: categoryId
fields.description: Links product to a Category

fields.name: productType
fields.description: High-level product type used for filtering and fitment logic

fields.name: currency
fields.description: Currency for price; site assumes USD

fields.name: ratingAverage
fields.description: Average customer rating (e.g., 4.3)

fields.name: ratingCount
fields.description: Number of customer reviews, used for 'Most Reviewed' sorting

fields.name: isActive
fields.description: Whether the product is available for browsing/purchase

fields.name: hasAppleCarPlay
fields.description: True if stereo supports Apple CarPlay

fields.name: hasBluetooth
fields.description: True if product (typically stereo) supports Bluetooth

fields.name: hasBackupCameraInput
fields.description: True if stereo has backup camera input

fields.name: freeShippingEligible
fields.description: True if product qualifies for free shipping filter

fields.name: includesWiringKit
fields.description: True if product or bundle clearly includes a wiring/amp kit

fields.name: dinSize
fields.description: Stereo's DIN size for filtering (single vs double-DIN)

fields.name: speakerSizeInches
fields.description: Speaker/subwoofer nominal size in inches (e.g., 6.5)

fields.name: speakerType
fields.description: Used for filters like 'Component Speakers'

fields.name: rmsPower
fields.description: RMS power rating in watts; used for speakers and amplifiers

fields.name: channelCount
fields.description: Number of channels for amplifiers (e.g., 4 for 4-channel amps)

fields.name: accessoryType
fields.description: Subtype used for Installation Accessories subcategories

fields.name: isBundle
fields.description: True if this product is a bundle/package

fields.name: bundleType
fields.description: Used to identify subwoofer + amplifier bundles and similar packages

entities.name: Vehicle
entities.description: Supported vehicle configurations for Shop by Vehicle flows.

fields.name: displayName
fields.description: Convenience label like '2018 Honda Civic Sedan'

entities.name: VehicleProductFitment
entities.description: Mappings between vehicles and products that fit them.

fields.name: fitmentType
fields.description: Used to show only compatible products (typically 'exact_fit')

fields.name: notes
fields.description: Optional fitment notes shown on product or vehicle results pages

entities.name: SelectedVehicle
entities.description: Current vehicle selection context for the single user.

fields.name: vehicleId
fields.description: The vehicle currently selected in Shop by Vehicle

entities.name: Cart
entities.description: Shopping cart for the single user.

fields.name: subtotal
fields.description: Cached subtotal for all cart items

entities.name: CartItem
entities.description: Line items in the shopping cart.

fields.name: quantity
fields.description: Quantity selected for this product

fields.name: unitPrice
fields.description: Price per unit at time of adding to cart

fields.name: lineSubtotal
fields.description: unitPrice * quantity

fields.name: protectionPlanId
fields.description: Optional warranty/protection plan attached to this cart line

entities.name: Wishlist
entities.description: Wishlist for saving products for later.

entities.name: WishlistItem
entities.description: Individual items saved in the wishlist.

entities.name: CompareSession
entities.description: Temporary product comparison selections for the comparison page.

fields.name: productIds
fields.description: Array of product IDs currently being compared

entities.name: ProtectionPlan
entities.description: Extended warranties or protection plans that can be attached to products.

fields.name: name
fields.description: e.g., '3-Year Protection Plan'

fields.name: durationYears
fields.description: Length of coverage in years

fields.name: price
fields.description: Cost of the protection plan

fields.name: applicableProductType
fields.description: Which product types this plan can be applied to

fields.name: isDefault
fields.description: True if shown as default/featured option

entities.name: ShippingMethod
entities.description: Available shipping options displayed at checkout, including Standard Shipping.

fields.name: code
fields.description: Internal shipping method code

fields.name: name
fields.description: Display label, e.g., 'Standard Shipping'

fields.name: cost
fields.description: Base shipping cost for the order

fields.name: isDefault
fields.description: True if selected by default on checkout page

fields.name: isFreeShipping
fields.description: True if this method represents free shipping

entities.name: CheckoutSession
entities.description: State of the checkout flow including contact information and chosen shipping method.

fields.name: cartId
fields.description: Cart being checked out

fields.name: contactEmail
fields.description: Email entered at checkout (e.g., 'user@example.com')

fields.name: contactFullName
fields.description: Full name entered at checkout (e.g., 'Test User')

fields.name: shippingMethodId
fields.description: Chosen shipping method (e.g., Standard Shipping)
